ec2.launchtemplate.ipv6add.CfnAbout:
Specifies an IPv6 address in an Amazon EC2 launch template.

`Ipv6Add` is a property of [AWS::EC2::LaunchTemplate NetworkInterface](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSCloudFormation/latest/UserGuide/aws-properties-ec2-launchtemplate-networkinterface.html).

ec2.launchtemplate.ipv6add.Ipv6Address.Description: One or more specific IPv6 addresses from the IPv6 CIDR block range of your subnet. You can't use this option if you're specifying a number of IPv6 addresses.
